researched_ingredients: 8 oz firm or extra-firm tofu, pressed and cubed
1 can (15 oz) chickpeas, rinsed and drained
2 cups mixed greens (e.g., spinach, kale, or spring mix)
1 large sweet potato, peeled and cubed
2-3 tablespoons water (or more, for desired consistency)
Salt and black pepper to taste
Optional: sesame seeds, fresh cilantro or parsley for garnish

shopping_tips: Look for store brand items and sales to stay within budget, especially for produce and pantry staples.
Consider buying bulk quinoa if you plan to make it often, as it can be more cost-effective per serving.
Check your pantry for existing olive oil, salt, pepper, and optional sesame seeds to save money.
Shop at discount grocers or farmers markets for fresher and potentially cheaper produce.
Prepare the tofu by pressing it in advance to save time on cooking day.
